title:
I've started a Patreon page for online marketing advice (link in bio) - I'm posting each week with useful guides for people who run their own websites and want to bring more traffic to them

But it doesn't have many members!

So, to boost its engagement I'm happy to gift a free year's subscription to any of my real life friends who run their own businesses / websites, and then you can tell your other small business owner friends about it and they can get a paid subscription.

Drop me a PM and I'll send you a link to join!
